title: Phase 3 practice adapter implementation
goal: Close Phase 3 in one implementation task by turning createPracticeModeAdapter into a working thin adapter and completing the minimal engine/store/sessionView changes it depends on, without starting Phase 4 route conversion.
constraints: No extra planning docs or slice-map by default
Default is to close Phase 3 in this one task; only split if a real blocker appears
No Phase 4 route conversion or shared-kitchen practice UI work
Keep PracticeSessionPage as fallback asset only; no shared-shell imports there
No sim-path changes unless strictly required for compile safety
Phase 4 verification order is fixed: npm run build -> npm run lint -> @self-reviewer -> npx tsc --noEmit
implementation_choice: Use Gate B option A by default: refine engine reasons instead of duplicating rule trees in adapter preflight
Keep source-not-clean as engine-internal and do not force a best-fit spec rejection_code
Keep PracticeSessionPage as fallback only; Phase 4 route conversion stays blocked
